description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a vibrant, multicolored plaid pattern across its canvas upper. The shoe has a classic white rubber toe cap and a thick white midsole with a black stripe running along the side. White laces are threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue is also covered in the same plaid design. The back of the shoe displays a vertical seam and a heel tab, with the word 'PIPINO' embossed on the heel of the sole. The overall construction suggests a comfortable, casual shoe suitable for urban environments, with a sturdy build and eye-catching design.
description: A high-top sneaker with a colorful plaid canvas upper, white rubber sole, and standard white laces. The shoe is visually striking and designed for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full plaid pattern, white laces, and black stripe on the sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white toe cap, lacing, and symmetrical plaid design on the tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar plaid pattern and visible eyelets, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the vertical seam, heel tab, and 'PIPINO' branding on the heel.
